/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/task_schedular.dir/Source/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_schedular.dir/Source/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_schedular.dir/Source/task_scheduler.cpp.o -o task_schedular
